# RC-02: Design Approval

**Track:** Risk Controls (`RC`) · **Priority:** MUST (mandatory) · **Status:** draft

Consolidated governance gate combining design approval with functional risk classification. Determines the appropriate sign-off authority based on the functional risk tier: high-risk requires senior architecture board approval; medium requires lead architect; low may be pre-approved. This control cannot be delegated to an agent.

## Required In Stages

| Stage | Name | Applicability |
|-------|------|---------------|
| 2 | System Design | Mandatory |

## Delegation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Pattern** | Human required |
| **Agent does** | Prepare design approval package with functional risk classification, risk summary, and supporting evidence. |
| **Human does** | Make the formal approval decision. This control cannot be delegated to an agent under any circumstances. |

## Inputs

| Artifact | Source Control | Description |
|----------|---------------|-------------|
| Design validation report | QC-03 | Completed design validation confirming standards compliance. |
| Risk classification | RC-01 | Risk tier from Stage 1 informing approval authority requirements. |


## Outputs

| Artifact | Type | Description | Retention |
|----------|------|-------------|-----------|
| Design approval decision | decision | Formal approval or rejection with authority identity, timestamp, and conditions. | 7 years (DORA) |


## Automation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Frequency** | per_change |
| **SLA** | — |
| **Tooling** | — |

## Failure Behaviour

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **On failure** | block |
| **Escalate to** | Risk Officer |

Rejected designs are returned for revision. No coding may begin without approval.

## Dependencies

- `QC-03`
- `RC-01`


## Regulatory Mapping

| Regulation | Article | Obligation |
|------------|---------|------------|
| DORA | Art. 8(1) | Governance and approval of ICT changes must be proportionate to risk |
| EU AI Act | Art. 9 | Risk management approval required for AI system design before implementation |


## Ownership

**Owner team:** Risk Management · **Owner role:** Risk Officer
